name: Cocktail Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the mayonnaise and flour.
2. Add the beaten eggs and milk to the mixture. Stir until well combined.
3. Gently stir in the crabmeat, shrimp, Swiss cheese, and chopped green onions.
4. Carefully pour the filling into the partially cooked frozen pie shell.
5. Place the dish in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Bake for 45 minutes or until the quiche is golden brown.
Note: Turn off the heat when done cooking.
